name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Victory in New Hampshire
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ty_desmoines&n=1)
---
| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ty_desmoines&n=2)
| |
---
\- FEBRUARY 10TH, 2016 -
**VICTORY IN NEW HAMPSHIRE**
| Dear Peter,

What a victory! Because of your incredible support, for which I am so thankful, this nation is now one step closer to strength, security and economic success.

I want to thank my family, campaign staff, hardworking volunteers, and every resident of New Hampshire who went to the polls and voted. I am touched and inspired by your spirit, patriotism, and desire to Make America Great Again.

This win is just the beginning. In order to secure the nomination, I need your help. If you would like to volunteer with the campaign and help make victories possible in other states, please [click here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fdonaldjtrump.com%2Fvolunteer&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ty_desmoines&n=3).

Without your passion and dedication, I would not be able to share my vision with people all across the county. With your help, we will make the country stronger and better than ever before. We are going to start winning again! We will win on trade, on immigration, on the military, on jobs and on so much more. Together, we will Make America Great Again!

Best Wishes and Sincere Thanks,
**Donald J. Trump**

---
| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)
---
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: I can't do this without you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33477807:WvJ5a6CoN:m:1:876315805:B5268C28426AC29CF77EE04651728B40:r)
---

Peter,

It wasn't long ago that you signed up to join me in my campaign for President.

I'd like to think that the reason you did so is the same reason that I got into this race to begin with -- we both see America rapidly approaching the point of no return.

What makes America exceptional is being actively undermined and our political class is not only incapable of fixing the problem, it is part of the problem.

**I decided to run for President because I believe I am best suited to heal, inspire and revive our nation -- and that's the reason that I will continue to aggressively move forward.**

But this can only happen if you, and the millions of your fellow supporters around the country, continue to stand with me. You're going to start hearing the media and other candidates pressure me to step aside. That's no surprise. They've been saying that since Day One.

[**So I ask two things of you right now -- ignore the chatter of the pundits and the political class, and commit to our campaign by making a secure donation of just $3 or more.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33477807:WvJ5a6CoN:m:1:876315805:B5268C28426AC29CF77EE04651728B40:r)

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33477807:WvJ5a6CoN:m:1:876315805:B5268C28426AC29CF77EE04651728B40:r)
---

I am committed to this campaign until the very end, not because I've wanted to be President for my whole life but because I am committed to America, our Constitution, our Judeo-Christian values, and to returning our government to "We the People."

I am committed to giving you a voice, because it has been ignored for far too long.

Together we've built a movement of people from every part of the country and from every walk of life. We've brought people into the political process that previously had no interest. This campaign gave them hope for the future.

[**Now, more than ever before, I need your help. I need you to think back to when you first signed up to join me, and in that spirit I ask you to donate just $3 or more.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33477807:WvJ5a6CoN:m:1:876315805:B5268C28426AC29CF77EE04651728B40:r)

When South Carolinians go to the polls on February 20, our campaign will face its next test and I will not have the resources to share my message if you do not stand with me.

Thank you for your faith in our future, and your willingness to stand with me and fight for it.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson
**

**
| | | **
** [****](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33477807:WvJ5a6CoN:m:1:876315805:B5268C28426AC29CF77EE04651728B40:r)** ** [****](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33477808:WvJ5a6CoN:m:1:876315805:B5268C28426AC29CF77EE04651728B40:r)** **
---
| ****
---
| | **

** [****](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33477809:WvJ5a6CoN:m:1:876315805:B5268C28426AC29CF77EE04651728B40:r)
---

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313**

** | ** ** Paid for by Carson America, Inc. ** **

name: John Kasich
subject: RE: Surging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America,__[www
clean_body: www.JohnKasich.com Peter - I just wanted to make sure that you saw Beth's email. We're very proud of the positive campaign that we're running and . Thank you! -John Sent from my iPad \-- From: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager To: John Kasich Date: Wednesday, February 10 Subject: Surging With our strong finish in New Hampshire yesterday, we proved that a positive campaign focused on bringing people together and solving problems works. Peter - we need your support to keep our surge growing Unfortunately, before the results were even in last evening, Jeb Bush started attacking Gov. Kasich and distorting his record. With your help, we'll have the resources we need to respond. . Thank you for all that you're doing! Beth Hansen Campaign Manager P.S. name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

On our second day back in South Carolina, we are seeing
evangelicals, libertarians, young people, and Reagan Democrats
come together to elect a consistent conservative.

Americans are fed up
with the empty promises of campaign conservatives, and they want
a leader who will be faithful to the Constitution and keep their
commitments to voters.

We have a strong team
in South Carolina, with nearly 10,000 volunteers in the state,
and between now and February 20, we are going to continue to see
courageous conservatives coalesce behind Ted Cruz in the Palmetto
State.

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

CRUZ NEWS

Dallas Morning News:
GOP looks more like a Ted Cruz-Donald Trump showdown

Daily Caller:
Limbaugh: Ted Cruz Is 'The Closest In Our Lifetimes We Have Ever
Been To Ronald Reagan'

Spartanburg Herald
Journal: Heidi Cruz urges supporters in Spartanburg to turn out
for S.C. primary

Cruz Might Be The Real Winner In New Hampshire

name: Columba Bush
subject: Happy Birthday
body:
Friend,

Today, Jeb turns 63, and I want to surprise him with a card signed by his supporters.

[**Will you wish him a Happy Birthday by signing his card right now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zrzjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcblmsb_bqcggbzd.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)

Campaigns are long and sometimes tiring, but knowing he has supporters like you is what keeps him going on the trail every day. Which is why I hope you'll take a minute right now and sign his card.
[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/fqyztbylrnjwqpqdwbfzrwcpyywclptlzbgbjlpbnsjj_bqcggbzd.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)
We only have a few hours to get thousands of supporters to sign his card before we surprise him with it!

I know he would love to see all the well wishes from his supporters, so please, sign his card now: [**Jeb2016.com/Wish-Jeb-a-Happy-Birthday/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wfzqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhwslgs_bqcggbzd.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)

Thank you,

Columba
[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ktdkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzrshvd_bqcggbzd.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=8647&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Stop-Gerrymandering@KatieMcGinty.com
subject: Add your name to stand up for fair elections
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3973506491591163904/606319090067308544?refcode=e20160211&refcode2=e20160211d&amount=5)
---
Friend,
For too long, gerrymandering has allowed politicians to manipulate the lines of electoral boundaries to help them win elections. This has had such a huge impact on the way we choose our leaders that President Obama addressed it in his final State of the Union. "Redrawing the lines" is a betrayal of our democracy and an abuse of power by politicians who want nothing more than to unfairly tip the scales. If we want fair elections, we need to stop redrawing the lines to benefit politicians and instead respect the people's voices. [**Sign your name to stand up against gerrymandering and support fair elections >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3973506491591163904/678376684105236480?ms=20160211&refcode=e20160211&refcode2=e20160211nd&amount=5) Out of all the states in the union, Pennsylvania is arguably one of the most impacted, with our Congressional districts drawn in such a way as to completely distort the goal of one person, one vote. Nonpartisan redistricting is essential to preserving fairness and representation in our democracy. We need electoral districts that accurately reflect the will of the people, not ones that egregiously skewer the results to give one party more power in exerting their will. [**Americans should have a vote that counts. Sign your name to reduce the impact of partisan politics on our democracy >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3973506491591163904/678376684105236480?ms=20160211&refcode=e20160211&refcode2=e20160211nd&amount=5)
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3973506491591163904/750434278143164416?refcode=e20160211&refcode2=e20160211d&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3973506491591163904/534261496029380608).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

This has had such a huge impact on the way we choose our leaders that President Obama addressed it in his final State of the Union. "Redrawing the lines" is a betrayal of our democracy and an abuse of power by politicians who want nothing more than to unfairly tip the scales. If we want fair elections, we need to stop redrawing the lines to benefit politicians and instead respect the people's voices. Out of all the states in the union, Pennsylvania is arguably one of the most impacted, with our Congressional districts drawn in such a way as to completely distort the goal of one person, one vote. Nonpartisan redistricting is essential to preserving fairness and representation in our democracy. We need electoral districts that accurately reflect the will of the people, not ones that egregiously skewer the results to give one party more power in exerting their will. | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Chris Shores
subject: Urgent Delegate Deadline to Sign Up and Support Ted Cruz!
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Did you see this?

Dear Friend,

We are approaching an
urgent deadline to sign up and support Ted Cruz in Prince William
County. We need more people to sign up as a Cruz Delegate to the
State or District Republican Party Convention.

Saturday, February
20, 2016 is the final deadline to sign up. Please respond to
this email right away for more information on how to sign up as a
Cruz delegate and attend the Republican Party of Virginia State
Convention on April 30th in Harrisonburg.

Thanks,

Chris

Chris Shores
Virginia State
Director
Ted Cruz for
President

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Meet Herman from Mount Vernon
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17190ab/3476a20e/c5d7037/27452392/3170495324/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, I took Herman the duck - or "Herman from Mount Vernon" - everywhere with me when I was embarked on the USS GEORGE WASHINGTON aircraft carrier because my daughter Alex was one year old and I wanted her to know I was thinking about her every day. I took pictures so that she would know later through Herman's eyes what we were doing during our deployment to Afghanistan and Iraq. Please watch the video below to see some of Herman's travels with me and the men and women I served with from hometowns all across America. [Then, please contribute today to help elect a voice to the Senate who knows what it means to serve with troops overseas, and who knows also what it means to take care of families back home.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17190ab/3476a20e/c5d7037/27452391/3170495324/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0211FBp1&amounts=25,50,100,150,250,500,1000")
| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17190ab/3476a20e/c5d7037/27452390/3170495324/VEsF/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TNHDz2-kJt4")

Joe

name: Jeb Bush, Jr.
subject: RE: Happy Birthday
body:
Friend,

Did you see Mom's note? Dad's birthday is today and you still haven't signed his card.

[**It won 't take more than a few seconds, so wish him a happy birthday now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zdbjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcblpww_hwhccmfn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)

We're going to show him this card while we're on the trail in South Carolina, and I hope your name will be on it.

Sign his card and wish him a happy birthday: **[**Jeb2016.com/Wish-Jeb-a-Happy-Birthday/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/kfmkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzrsmdf_hwhccmfn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)**

Thank you,

Jeb Jr.
[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jfrhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkptmjqn_hwhccmfn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Columba Bush
Subject: Happy Birthday**
Friend,

Today, Jeb turns 63, and I want to surprise him with a card signed by his supporters.

[**Will you wish him a Happy Birthday by signing his card right now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/kstkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzrsmft_hwhccmfn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)

Campaigns are long and sometimes tiring, but knowing he has supporters like you is what keeps him going on the trail every day. Which is why I hope you'll take a minute right now and sign his card.
[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mnpgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjtdysc_hwhccmfn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)
We only have a few hours to get thousands of supporters to sign his card before we surprise him with it!

I know he would love to see all the well wishes from his supporters, so please, sign his card now: [**Jeb2016.com/Wish-Jeb-a-Happy-Birthday/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/vhmbdkyzmghnrcrfnktbmnqcyynqzcdzbkjkhzckgpmv_hwhccmfn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)

Thank you,

Columba
[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wgnqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhwsvzv_hwhccmfn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=8664&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Team Murphy
subject: Not. a. word.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Get this --

All the GOP candidates for Senate were asked whether they agree with Marco Rubio's stance against abortion, even in the case of rape or incest.

Their response? **ABSOLUTELY NOTHING. Not. a. word.**

It's unconscionable. Survivors of horrific sexual assault should not have the additional burden of a politician dictating their medical choices.

Florida women deserve to know where the GOP candidates stand.

[**Demand that the GOP Senate candidates declare where they stand on a woman's right to choose >>**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22cf/738133e4/3b21a696/7f83d0df/1899194045/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160211m")

This silence proves once again that we cannot afford to send another Republican -- especially a Marco Rubio mini me -- to Washington.

**Just imagine what a Republican Congress with a Republican president would do to women 's right to choose.** That's what's at stake in this race.

[**Do what you can right now. Stand with us the protect women 's right to choose >>**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22cf/738133e4/3b21a696/7f83d0df/1899194045/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160211m")

Thanks for your support,

Team Murphy

| | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22cf/738133e4/3b21a696/7f83d0d8/1899194045/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Bernie raised $6 million yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
What this team is about | Friend --

In the 24 hours after the polls closed in New Hampshire, Bernie Sanders' team says they raised more than $6 million.

One of Bernie's top strategists even bragged: "We are a better campaign ... And as of today, I believe we have more resources, campaign to campaign, to expend. We are demonstrating that resource superiority by going on television all across this country."

I think he's dead wrong about who has a better campaign -- but unfortunately, he's right about who has more resources. We were outspent 3-to-1 on television in New Hampshire, and we need to make sure that doesn't happen again. **[We need 5 donors from your town to help out today -- can you chip in $1 right now to help close the gap?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We have 14 contests in the next three weeks, and we just can't allow our team to be outraised and outspent like this. This team is bigger, more diverse, and more enthusiastic than Bernie’s team -- it's time for us to show it.

**Chip in $1 right now -- let's show the world how strong we are and win this nomination:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever. Chip in $1 to stand with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQ3MDAwOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTE5Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: John Kasich
subject: We proved them wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America,__[www
clean_body: www.JohnKasich.com Peter, they said it couldn't be done. The media and pundits said we couldn't run a positive campaign and succeed - But we proved them wrong. We beat back all of the negative attacks with a positive message in New Hampshire. Now in South Carolina, the attacks from Jeb Bush and others are only growing more negative and more intense. . Hillary Clinton 's own advisors have admitted that they fear facing me the most this fall because our message is unifying the country. And don't forget that I'm from Ohio. No Republican has EVER been elected to the White House without winning in Ohio and I can promise you that I'll defeat Hillary in the Buckeye State. . Thank you. Sincerely, -John John Kasich Governor of Ohio & Presidential Candidate P.S. If you'd like to sign up to volunteer, please get started at: **************** **************** ************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** Paid for by Kasich For America,_ This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 18, 2015. name: Team Murphy
subject: TRUMP IN TAMPA (poll)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **ALERT: TRUMP IN TAMPA** Three days after he had a MASSIVE victory in the New Hampshire primary, Donald Trump is coming to Tampa on Friday.

We're wondering, do you think Trump will win the Florida Presidential Primary on March 15th? [**YES**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22cd/738133e4/3b270278/7f83d0b5/2779019271/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160212pm?refcode=pme160212pm_a_y&recurring=true&amount=25.00") [**NO**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22cd/738133e4/3b270278/7f83d0b6/2779019271/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160212pm?refcode=pme160212pm_a_n&recurring=true&amount=25.00") Whether the Republican nominee is Trump, Rubio, Cruz, or someone else, we do know one thing: their values don't belong in Florida.

As Republicans continue to mobilize in Florida and across the country, there has never been a more important time to stand up for our values by taking back the Senate and electing Patrick.

We appreciate all that you do for Patrick as a member of Team Murphy and really look forward to hearing what you think.

Thanks!

\--Team Murphy

| | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22cd/738133e4/3b270278/7f83d0b7/2779019271/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

We're wondering, do you think Trump will win the Florida Presidential Primary on March 15th? "" "" Whether the Republican nominee is Trump, Rubio, Cruz, or someone else, we do know one thing: their values don't belong in Florida. As Republicans continue to mobilize in Florida and across the country, there has never been a more important time to stand up for our values by taking back the Senate and electing Patrick. We appreciate all that you do for Patrick as a member of Team Murphy and really look forward to hearing what you think. Thanks! \--Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Nasty Attack
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Just hours ago, Politico reported that a Super PAC -- funded
by the same characters who attacked me in Iowa -- is launching a
new negative ad campaign worth $1.5 million dollars to
misrepresent my record and mislead the voters of South Carolina.

BREAKING: $1.5 Million in Nasty Ads Meets Cruz in South Carolina

Friend --

I wish I had better news.

But as you can see below, this race has turned nasty again.

In the last 24 hours, Politico reported that a Super PAC --
funded by the same characters who attacked me in Iowa -- is
launching a new $1.5 million dollar negative ad campaign to
misrepresent my record and mislead the voters of South Carolina.

These slimy Super PAC ads compare my conservative record to
BERNIE SANDERS in an attempt to fool the voters of South
Carolina.

Will you help me respond?
This is a campaign emergency -- I need your immediate help.

Friend, I wish I didn't have to ask, but I can't face this
without you. Will you make an emergency contribution to help me
respond to these negative ads?
The Washington Cartel is pulling out all the stops...literally
spending millions to defeat me. In Iowa -- by God's grace and
with your immeasurable help -- I had the resources to respond.

Today -- I must be brutally honest -- I don't have the resources
to respond.

FIGHT BACK »

Every dollar you give today will go directly to responding to
these dishonest and misleading attacks.

I can't do it without you.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

PAID FOR BY CRUZ
FOR PRESIDENTwww.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2016 All Rights Reserved | Privacy Policy

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Team Katie
subject: Gov. Rendell knows it
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Katie is our best chance at winning this seat and taking back the Senate -- I know it, Pat Toomey knows it, and the Republican establishment knows it, too. That's why we need to stand with Katie right now and make sure she's our nominee heading into the general election. -- Gov. Ed Rendell

Join Gov. Rendell and help Katie take on Pat Toomey and win. DONATE NOW.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e201602011.2&refcode2=e20160211.2nd&amount=5

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/6535779801658032128/-3500400820141162496.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Before the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
This doesn't fit the narrative: | Friend --

In the 24 hours after our first loss of this campaign, this team stepped up. Hundreds of thousands of people are giving to support this historic campaign. **[Can you join them and chip in $1 right now?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The press and our opponent will continue to mischaracterize and disparage our team, but we know the truth. We have over 700,000 grassroots donors and millions more who are energized by our candidate, our message, and our historic campaign.

But we can’t control the narrative, so we need to put our heads down and focus on the things we can control: how strong our team is and how many people we’re able to reach.

**Before Hillary takes the debate stage tonight, she needs to know that you're in this with her. Tell her you're ready to fight and win -- chip in $1 right now.** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever. Chip in $1 to stand with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ3MDM1MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxOTQ2MjM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
